summary: Tested download token security feature and footer format implementation. Backend: 12/13 tests passed. Download token generation, single-use validation, and PDF/DOCX exports with download_token all working correctly. Frontend: Login, dashboard, case detail, and reports section all functional. Footer format matches specification.

minor.issue: UnicodeEncodeError: 'latin-1' codec can't encode character '\u2014' (em-dash) in filename header. Pre-existing bug, not related to download token feature.

action_items: Fix timeline PDF export filename encoding issue (replace em-dash with hyphen in filename)
critical_code_review_comments: Download token implementation is correct: 5-min expiry, single-use, stored in MongoDB download_tokens collection
Footer format matches specification: 'Documented from the Criminal Law /Appeal Management Application - [Doc Type] - For [Case Name] [Date]'
Frontend correctly uses buildSecureDownloadUrl for iOS PDF downloads and timeline PDF exports
Legacy session_token in CaseDetail.jsx is only used for Bearer header auth and WebSocket (allowed per spec)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, case detail, reports all functional)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Download token feature fully implemented and tested. The only failing test is timeline PDF export which has a pre-existing Unicode encoding bug in the filename (em-dash character). All download token tests pass: generation, single-use validation, query param auth, PDF/DOCX exports.

features_tested.download_token_generation: PASS - POST /api/auth/download-token generates token when authenticated
features_tested.download_token_query_param: PASS - Works as query param on protected endpoints
features_tested.download_token_single_use: PASS - Second use returns 401 with 'already used' error
features_tested.legacy_session_token: PASS - Still works for backward compatibility
features_tested.pdf_export_with_download_token: PASS - PDF export works with download_token query param
features_tested.docx_export_with_download_token: PASS - DOCX export works with download_token query param
features_tested.footer_format_frontend: PASS - exportHtml.js, ReportView.jsx, BarristerView.jsx all use correct format
features_tested.timeline_pdf_export: FAIL - Pre-existing Unicode encoding bug in filename
